auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Twenty API key sent as a Bearer token. Create a key in Settings > API & Webhooks > Create key in your Twenty workspace: https://docs.twenty.com/developers/extend/api

actions.name: create_record
actions.description: Create one Twenty record for a workspace object.

objectNamePlural.description: The Twenty plural object API name, such as companies, people, opportunities, or a custom object plural name.

data.description: A JSON object accepted or returned by Twenty.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for writing a Twenty record.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for a created Twenty record.

actions.name: delete_record
actions.description: Delete one Twenty record by object API name and record UUID.

objectNamePlural.description: The Twenty plural object API name, such as companies, people, opportunities, or a custom object plural name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Twenty record.

success.description: Whether Twenty reported the delete operation as successful.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for a deleted Twenty record.

actions.name: list_metadata_objects
actions.description: List Twenty metadata objects for the connected workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Twenty metadata objects.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for Twenty metadata objects.

actions.name: list_records
actions.description: List Twenty records for one workspace object using the generated schema-per-tenant REST API.

objectNamePlural.description: The Twenty plural object API name, such as companies, people, opportunities, or a custom object plural name.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

filter.description: A JSON object accepted or returned by Twenty.

orderBy.description: A JSON object accepted or returned by Twenty.

depth.description: The relation depth to include in the returned records.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Twenty records.

records.description: The Twenty records returned by the API.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for a Twenty record listing.

actions.name: retrieve_record
actions.description: Retrieve one Twenty record by object API name and record UUID.

objectNamePlural.description: The Twenty plural object API name, such as companies, people, opportunities, or a custom object plural name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Twenty record.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for one Twenty record.

actions.name: update_record
actions.description: Update one Twenty record by object API name and record UUID.

objectNamePlural.description: The Twenty plural object API name, such as companies, people, opportunities, or a custom object plural name.

data.description: A JSON object accepted or returned by Twenty.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating a Twenty record.

raw.description: The raw Twenty API response object.

outputSchema.description: Output payload for an updated Twenty record.
